flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Frederick Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Frederick Community College rose 26% between 2006 and 2009 (15.8% → 20.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Frederick Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 4.2k).
